title: OCGN Stock Rallies on Wall Street Optimism for Clinical Pipeline
text: Ocugen stock rallied on Wall Street optimism for clinical pipeline with multiple upcoming milestones and data announcements. Retail investors closely tracking company's progress on three late-stage modifier gene therapy programs. Key catalysts attracting investor interest: OCU400 Phase 3 liMeliGhT trial completing enrollment with topline data expected Q4 2026 or Q1 2027. OCU410 ArMaDa Phase 1/2 data driving momentum, with Phase 3 initiation expected Q3 2026. OCU410ST Phase 2/3 GARDian3 pivotal trial underway with ongoing enrollment. Retail sentiment on Stocktwits: Trend of extreme bullishness following positive clinical announcements. Message volumes remain at high levels during trial updates. Community focus on gene therapy transformative potential for treating blindness diseases. Wall Street analysts bullish on three-BLA strategy by 2028. Analyst consensus upgraded following positive clinical data and FDA alignments. Average price target suggests significant upside over next 12 months. Investors awaiting continued clinical progress, regulatory approvals, and potential commercialization catalysts in late 2026 and beyond.
